content_body:
A Step Above Stables offer the natural beauty and serenity of the North Georgia Mountains located in Blairsville, GA - just a 20 minute drive from Blue Ridge, GA. You will follow a guide through forest trails of which some areas overlook beautiful Lake Nottley. While there is a guide provided you can choose an easy walking pace for the entire trail, as well as, when the trail opens up you can experience the smooth quickened gait and rack of which the walking horse is most noted.

If you're looking to buy a horse, A Step Above Stables is the place to purchase a beautiful horse. Prized for the care they give their horses, law enforcement agencies come here to purchase their horses. 

A full-service year round horse facility also offer boarding for your horse.

Unlike many others who offer trail horsebackriding in North Georgia, we at A Step Above Stables feel that you will have a much more enjoyable experience in a private group of just your family & friends. We have different trails that are guided in 1, 1 and a half, and 2 hour rides.
title: A Step Above Stables
